=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0-beta.27

/.src/multipleEffectProvide.ts(22,3): warning TS377033: Avoid chaining Effect.provide calls, as this can lead to service lifecycle issues. Instead, merge layers and provide them in a single call. effect(multipleEffectProvide)
/.src/multipleEffectProvide.ts(27,3): warning TS377033: Avoid chaining Effect.provide calls, as this can lead to service lifecycle issues. Instead, merge layers and provide them in a single call. effect(multipleEffectProvide)
/.src/multipleEffectProvide.ts(30,3): warning TS377033: Avoid chaining Effect.provide calls, as this can lead to service lifecycle issues. Instead, merge layers and provide them in a single call. effect(multipleEffectProvide)
/.src/multipleEffectProvide.ts(35,3): warning TS377033: Avoid chaining Effect.provide calls, as this can lead to service lifecycle issues. Instead, merge layers and provide them in a single call. effect(multipleEffectProvide)


==== /.src/multipleEffectProvide.ts (4 errors) ====
    import { ServiceMap, Effect, Layer } from "effect"
    
    class MyService1 extends ServiceMap.Service<MyService1>()("MyService1", {
      make: Effect.succeed({ value: 1 })
    }) {
      static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
    }
    
    class MyService2 extends ServiceMap.Service<MyService2>()("MyService2", {
      make: Effect.succeed({ value: 2 })
    }) {
      static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
    }
    
    class MyService3 extends ServiceMap.Service<MyService3>()("MyService3", {
      make: Effect.succeed({ value: 3 })
    }) {
      static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
    }
    
    export const shouldReport = Effect.void.pipe(
      Effect.provide(MyService1.Default),
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377033: Avoid chaining Effect.provide calls, as this can lead to service lifecycle issues. Instead, merge layers and provide them in a single call. effect(multipleEffectProvide)
      Effect.provide(MyService2.Default)
    )
    
    export const shouldReportSeparately = Effect.void.pipe(
      Effect.provide(MyService1.Default),
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377033: Avoid chaining Effect.provide calls, as this can lead to service lifecycle issues. Instead, merge layers and provide them in a single call. effect(multipleEffectProvide)
      Effect.provide(MyService2.Default),
      Effect.ignore,
      Effect.provide(MyService1.Default),
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377033: Avoid chaining Effect.provide calls, as this can lead to service lifecycle issues. Instead, merge layers and provide them in a single call. effect(multipleEffectProvide)
      Effect.provide(MyService2.Default)
    )
    
    export const shouldReportSingle = Effect.void.pipe(
      Effect.provide(MyService1.Default),
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377033: Avoid chaining Effect.provide calls, as this can lead to service lifecycle issues. Instead, merge layers and provide them in a single call. effect(multipleEffectProvide)
      Effect.provide(MyService2.Default),
      Effect.provide(MyService3.Default)
    )
